goal: Retrieve all Wazuh rule 100110 (high-entropy DNS subdomain) alert events for target-endpoint over the past 7 days, with a breakdown by distinct dns_domain values queried.
what_to_characterize: All distinct dns_domain values in rule 100110 fires
Parent domains (the registrable domain under each high-entropy subdomain)
Temporal clustering — when did each parent domain's queries occur
Whether different parent domains appear in the same time window (simultaneous C2 channels vs sequential)
